Setup
Dust / sand profile
Reduces 100-hr inspection interval to 50 hrs.
AVGAS flag
Shows AVGAS-specific oil change advisory cards.
IVO variable pitch propeller
Shows IVO prop maintenance tasks and service bulletins.
Dark / light mode
Switch between dark cockpit and light theme.
Reference date override
Test future or past due states visually.
Testing only
JNP / Statement of compliance
Date of last annual inspection.
Service Bulletin Updates
Automatically checks the AutoGyro website for new SBs once every 24 hours.
Save backup file
Export all your data as JSON.
Restore backup file
Import a previously saved JSON backup.
Print / save PDF
Print current tracker state.
Reset all data
Clears all saved state. Cannot be undone.
